title: Order Confirmation
description: Thank you for your order. Here's what happens next.

steps.title: Check your email
steps.description: You'll receive a confirmation email with your booking reference and appointment details.

steps.title: We'll call to confirm
steps.description: A member of our team will call you within 4 working hours to confirm a convenient appointment time.

steps.title: Prepare for your visit
steps.description: We'll send you any preparation instructions specific to your service. Some tests may require fasting.

blocks.heading: Get in touch
blocks.bodyText: If you need to reschedule or have any questions about your appointment, please don't hesitate to contact us.

blocks.heading: Consider membership
blocks.bodyText: For comprehensive, ongoing healthcare with priority access and annual screenings, explore our membership programme.
